allow: Bash(node -e "const QRCode = require\('qrcode'\); const os = require\('os'\); console.log\('qrcode OK, os OK'\); QRCode.toDataURL\('http://test', {width:100}, \(err, url\) => { if\(err\) { console.error\('QR ERROR:', err\); } else { console.log\('QR generation OK, data URL length:', url.length\); } }\);")
